languages.text: "Благочестивое решение, Лорд-капитан. Немедленно передам ваше повеление очистить Зарков от ксеносов".
"A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."
languages.original_text: "Благочестивое решение, Лорд-капитан. Немедленно передам ваше повеление очистить Зарков от ксеносов".

traits.locale_text: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."
"A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."
"A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."

languages.text: 「聖なる決断、艦長様。私は即座に、ザルコフから異種生物を排除する貴方の命令を伝えます」
languages.original_text: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる決断、艦長様。私は即座に、ザルコフから異種生物を排除する貴方の命令を伝えます。」

languages.text: «Es una decisión pía, Lord Capitán. Enviaré inmediatamente sus órdenes para que Zarkov sea purgado de xenos».
languages.original_text: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."

traits.locale_text: «Es una decisión pía, Lord Capitán. Enviaré inmediatamente sus órdenes para que Zarkov sea purgado de xenos».

languages.text: “虔诚的决断，舰长大人。我即刻传达命令，剿灭扎尔科夫上的异形。”
languages.original_text: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."

traits.locale_text: “虔诚的决断，舰长大人。我即刻传达命令，剿灭扎尔科夫上的异形。”

languages.text: "Eine gottesfürchtige Entscheidung, Lord Captain. Ich werde Euren Befehl, Zarkov von sämtlichen Xenos zu säubern, umgehend weiterleiten."
languages.original_text: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Eine gottesfürchtige Entscheidung, Lord Captain. Ich werde Euren Befehl, Zarkov von sämtlichen Xenos zu säubern, umgehend weiterleiten."

languages.text: "Dindar bir karar Lord Kaptan. Zarkov'u zenolardan arındırma emrinizi derhâl ileteceğim."
languages.original_text: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Dindar bir karar Lord Kaptan. Zarkov'u zenolardan arındırma emrinizi derhâl ileteceğim."

languages.text: « Une décision pieuse, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je transmets immédiatement votre ordre de purger Zarkov du fléau xénos. »
languages.original_text: "A pious decision, Lord Captain. I will immediately relay your command to purge Zarkov of xenos."

traits.locale_text: « Une décision pieuse, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je transmets immédiatement votre ordre de purger Zarkov du fléau xénos. »
